examples: We spent the night in the village of Tann, in Hesse, and awoke at dawn to chill winds and an ominously overcast sky.
The tattooed man leans toward me ominously.
The clock clicked ominously close to her 11:05 performance time.
More ominously Facebook is allowing its partner sites to store this demographic and marketing information indefinitely.
Ominously, Mr Morris sees a closer parallel in the great Japanese asset bubble of the 1980s.
